final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for a domestic China roadshow fundraising event announcing the launch of "GPT5.5", with presenter "奥特曼" (Sam Altman), styled to match Chinese GP/VC investor roadshow aesthetics.

Style/medium: clean editorial presentation cover design, flat vector meets photorealistic portrait, polished Chinese tech-finance roadshow deck aesthetic — think Sequoia China / ZhenFund pitch deck cover energy
Composition: centered layout, large bold headline at top, presenter portrait or silhouette in lower center, logo mark and event label balanced with generous whitespace, 16:9 slide proportion
Subject: GPT5.5 product launch announcement slide — dominant headline text "GPT5.5 正式发布", sub-headline indicating fundraising roadshow context, presenter credit line "演讲人：奥特曼"
Scene/backdrop: abstract deep navy or midnight blue gradient background with subtle circuit-node or data-flow line texture, conveying cutting-edge AI technology and institutional credibility
Lighting/mood: cool blue-white ambient glow emanating from center, confident and authoritative, aspirational yet grounded — GP investor meeting tone, not consumer hype
Color palette: deep navy as dominant base, electric blue and white as primary accents, gold or champagne as a single prestige accent on key text or divider line
Text (verbatim): "GPT5.5 正式发布" as main headline, "演讲人：奥特曼" as presenter credit
Constraints: must read clearly as a projected slide at distance; text hierarchy must follow Chinese roadshow convention — company/product name largest, event type second, presenter third; layout must feel institutional and credible to Chinese LP/GP audience
Avoid: consumer app store aesthetics; cartoon or anime style; overly Western Silicon Valley startup vibes; cluttered infographic elements; watermark; gradient rainbow colors
